changes.before: Short patrol-road banter and surrounding beats landed in isolated units.
changes.after: Added connective clauses to Lor'themar's reaction, Sylvanas's southern-stones line, the road-bed paragraph, and the runestone approach.
changes.rationale: Broadened connective tissue in the banter run without changing the beat order.

changes.before: The southern-stones exchange stacked clipped replies.
changes.after: Attached dialogue to reins, glances, and directional looks so the exchange moves with the ride.
changes.rationale: Reduced telegram rhythm in the road banter while keeping Sylvanas clipped.

changes.before: "Choose." / "Measuring, ma'am." / "Worse." landed as a bare clipped chain.
changes.after: Added the runner's breath and mud detail, gave Sylvanas an inline tag, and folded Lor'themar's reaction into a single sentence.
changes.rationale: Kept the pressure of the exchange while giving the chain connective texture.

changes.before: The north-patrol handoff broke into short detached exchanges.
changes.after: Joined Lor'themar's dossier line, the patrol order, and the warning exchange with compound delivery and closer physical placement.
changes.rationale: Restored through-line momentum before the patrol split.

changes.before: Lor'themar's warning and Sylvanas's replies were stacked as short declaratives.
changes.after: Attached the warning to physical proximity and let Sylvanas's answer ride on that motion.
changes.rationale: Reduced clipped drift at the handoff without softening the power dynamic.

changes.before: The runner's report and Sylvanas's questions broke into separate short units.
changes.after: Linked Sylvanas's question to the hard ride and kept the explanatory line moving inside the same pressure beat.
changes.rationale: Carried the horse-motion through the report instead of stopping for each line.

changes.before: Terrain detail, tactical thought, and the runner's evidence list broke into clipped fragments.
changes.after: Rebuilt the field-kit description into fuller clauses and tied the frost-burn detail to the runner's speech rhythm.
changes.rationale: Cut the evidence-stack effect while preserving Sylvanas's fast filtering.

changes.before: Cyndia's greeting and Sylvanas's arrival beat were split into thin units.
changes.after: Folded Cyndia's greeting into her entrance sentence and attached Sylvanas's dismount to the exchange.
changes.rationale: Made the outpost arrival flow instead of ticking beat-by-beat.

changes.before: The name reveal and Sylvanas's inference landed as separate clipped beats.
changes.after: Moved Cyndia's breath into the reveal and joined Sylvanas's recognition to her follow-up question.
changes.rationale: Interrupted the short-sentence chain at the identity confirmation.

changes.before: Jaina's confinement summary ended in a run of short back-and-forth lines.
changes.after: Combined the 'Charming / Not especially' exchange and fused the question about striking Jaina into Cyndia's answer.
changes.rationale: Kept the dry tone while reducing the telegram effect around the confinement report.

changes.before: Satchel analysis and follow-up questions were broken into stacked observations and clipped evidence lines.
changes.after: Turned the fieldwork verdict into a colon sentence, extended the crease beat, and recombined the physical evidence into 'Boots, ink, frost burns—field signs, not court polish.'
changes.rationale: Layered observation and inference without adding new story material.

changes.before: The warning exchange ticked through short replies.
changes.after: Set Sylvanas's threat inside a tagged sentence and let Cyndia's answer break against it with one tight reaction beat.
changes.rationale: Preserved the hierarchy while smoothing the clipped run.

changes.before: The holding-room approach broke into detached approach beats and short threshold dialogue.
changes.after: Attached Cyndia to Sylvanas's movement toward the holding room, linked the yard crossing to lowered voices, and compressed the reckless/convinced exchange into fewer units.
changes.rationale: Restored movement through the approach while keeping the threshold pressure.
